name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan introduces significant changes to the methodology, including PCA dimensionality reduction, nuisance-decorrelation whitening, a new MLP regressor, and a different inference strategy (gradient-based likelihood optimization). Since the data processing pipeline and the core modeling approach have fundamentally changed, none of the previous steps can be reused.
